name: tech_radar
description:
Generate a technology radar from decisions and content signals.

Places technologies into quadrants (languages, frameworks, tools, platforms) and rings (adopt, trial, assess, hold) based on your decisions, usage patterns, and content engagement.

quadrant.description: Filter by quadrant. Leave empty for all quadrants.

ring.description: Filter by ring. Leave empty for all rings.

search.description: Free-text search to filter entries by name.
